title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool by Anthropic that enables rapid design generation from design systems and brand guidelines. The tutorial demonstrates a 4-step workflow for building design systems, generating branded landing pages, and managing token usage for production-ready design assets.
writeup: This tutorial covers Claude Design, an AI design tool from Anthropic that generates designs from design systems and brand guidelines. It walks through a 4-step workflow for building design systems, producing branded landing pages, and managing token usage for production-ready assets. The relevance lies in connecting brand inputs to rapid, repeatable design output. Key takeaways include the structured workflow itself and the emphasis on token management when scaling toward production.
